notes: Core contribution is a working CLI prototype (Hedwig). A formative survey of 21 engineers (IRB-approved) motivates design (real human-subjects data). Evaluation is NOT a user study: it uses synthetic developer-persona interaction traces (simulation) to seed the policy, a comparative benchmark-style evaluation against Claude Code on two fixed tasks scored by an LLM judge, plus an illustrative two-session case-study walkthrough. Authors explicitly note no formal user study was conducted.
